Off Calendar May-26-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mary Wiederhold, Esq. representing Plaintiff Susan Boone.
Xavier Harris, Esq. representing Defendants.

Defense counsel argues as to the tentative ruling and offers proof.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication

is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exists, including 2, 11, 15, and 19. Additionally, summary adjudication is denied as the Notice of Motion/Separate Statement does not comply with CRC 3.1350(b).

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To May-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT ANGELA CHEER , INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE TAKAKUWA CHEER REVOCABLE TRUST, LUCAS DANG, GENEVIEVE CHEER-DANG, JEFFERY CHEER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is continued to May 5, 2026 for moving and opposing party to provide properly tabbed courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition no later than April 17, 2026 with cover letters letter reflecting new hearing date. Untabbed copies may be picked up from department 501.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Her Objections To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SUSAN BOONE's Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Her Objections To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Documents, Set One.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Susan Boone's motion for relief from waiver of her objections to Defendants' Set One Form and Special Interrogatories and Requests for Documents is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A First Amended Complaint For Damages
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint For Damages
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. Re-noticed for October 6, 2025. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
